speaker: WOODY
text: Reach for the sky. ANDY Oh, no! Sheriff Woody!! ANDY I'm here to stop you, One-Eyed Bart. Andy's hand pulls out one of Mr. Potato Head's eyes. ANDY Doooooh! How'd you know it was me! ANDY Are you gonna come quietly? ANDY You can't touch me Sheriff! I brought my attack dog with a built- in force field! Andy places a TOY DOG, with a SLINKY for a mid-section, in front of Mr. Potato Head and stretches him out. ANDY Well I brought my DINOSAUR, who eats force field dogs!! Andy reveals a PLASTIC TYRANNOSAURUS REX, who stomps on the Slinky Dog. ANDY AAAAR! ROAR-ROAR-ROAR! ANDY YIPE! YIPE-YIPE-YIPE! ANDY You're goin' to jail, Bart. Andy picks up Mr. Potato Head and places him in a baby crib in the room. A cardboard sign is taped to the bars with the word "JAIL" written in crayon. ANDY Say good-bye to the wife and tatertots. Andy's 1-year-old sister, MOLLY, crawls over and picks up Mr. Potato Head. She sucks on him for a beat then proceeds to pound the toy repeatedly against the rail of her crib, forcing some of his parts loose. Andy, wearing a cowboy hat himself, picks up Woody off the floor.

speaker: ANDY
text: You saved the day again, Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: You're my favorite deputy.

speaker: ANDY
text: C'mon, let's wrangle up the cattle. -- Andy then rides Woody around on an RC car, and herds the remaining "cow" boxes under Molly's crib.

speaker: ANDY
text: Score!

speaker: ANDY
text: Wow! Cool!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Whadda ya think?

speaker: ANDY
text: Oh, this looks GREAT, Mom! ANGLE: THE ADJOINING DINING ROOM MRS. DAVIS, Andy's thirty eight-year-old mom, has just finished decorating the area with streamers and balloons. A banner is draped across the archway. It reads: "Happy Birthday Andy". Woody's frozen face stares in the direction of the birthday decorations.

speaker: ANDY
text: Can we leave this up 'til we move?

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Well, sure, we can leave it up.

speaker: ANDY
text: Yeah!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Now go get Molly. Your friends are going to be here any minute.

speaker: ANDY
text: Okay. Andy picks up Woody from the couch and runs upstairs.

speaker: ANDY
text: It's partytime, Woody!

speaker: ANDY
text: Howdy, Little Lady! He deposits Woody on the bed and pulls his string one last time.

speaker: WOODY
text: Somebody's poisoned the waterhole.

speaker: ANDY
text: C'mon, Molly. Oh, you're getting heavy! See ya later, Woody. Andy exits.

speaker: WOODY
text: Pull my string! The birthday party's today?! Woody thinks.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, everybody. Coast is clear. The bedroom comes alive. TOYS emerge from the toy box, the closet, the shelves, etc... in a flurry of activity. POTATO HEAD, his body parts strewn across the floor, sits himself upright and begins to re-assemble himself.

speaker: HAMM
text: I don't get it. Hamm walks away.

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh, hey Sarge, have you seen Slinky?

speaker: SARGENT
text: Sir! No Sir!

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, thank you. At ease. Woody hops off the bed.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey, Slinky?

speaker: SLINKY
text: Right here, Woody! A toy Slinky dog, SLINKY, appears from under the bed pushing out a checker board set. He begins to place the checkers on the board.

speaker: SLINKY
text: I'm red this time.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, Slink --

speaker: SLINKY
text: Oh... well alright, you can be red if you want.

speaker: WOODY
text: Not now, Slink. I've got some bad news.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Bad news?!

speaker: WOODY
text: Sh-h-h-h-h!! Woody covers up Slinky's mouth, aware that the other toys in the room are watching. He leans in close to Slinky.

speaker: WOODY
text: Just gather everyone up for a staff meeting and be happy!!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Got it. Slinky shuffles off.

speaker: WOODY
text: Be HAPPY! Slinky perks up his gait and LAUGHS HARD. Woody proceeds in the other direction. He passes a toy ROBOT and SNAKE partially hidden under the bedspread.

speaker: WOODY
text: Staff meeting, everybody.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey Etch'! Draw! Both Etch and Woody whip around like gunfighters. Before Woody can fully extend his arm out, the Etch-A- Sketch etches a gun on its screen.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh!! You got me again, Etch'! You've been working on that draw. Fastest knobs in the west. Slinky passes a group of toys on the floor.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Got a staff meeting, you guys, come on, let's go! Robot and Snake begin constructing a podium made out of Legos and a Tinker Toy tub while Woody searches the floor.

speaker: WOODY
text: Now where is that --? Aw, hey, who moved my doodle pad way over here? Woody spots the doodle pad on the floor by the desk and walks over to it. As he reaches down to pick it up... REX, the plastic dinosaur, jumps out to scare Woody.

speaker: REX
text: ROOAAAARR!!!

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, how ya doin', Rex? Rex suddenly turns timid.

speaker: REX
text: Were you scared? Tell me honestly.

speaker: WOODY
text: I was close to being scared that time. Woody heads back to the podium. Rex follows.

speaker: REX
text: I'm going for fearsome here, but I just don't feel it. I think I'm just coming off as annoying. A crook suddenly grabs Woody's neck and jerks him towards BO PEEP, the porcelain figurine.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: I wanted to thank you, Woody, for saving my flock,

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, hey - it was nothing.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Whadda ya say I get someone else to watch the sheep tonight?

speaker: WOODY
text: Heh, heh... oh yeah, uh, I... Bo saunters back towards her lamp stand, passing a stack of ABC blocks.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Remember, I'm just a couple of blocks away. Woody is left lovestruck. All the rest of the toys in the room are filing past Slinky.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Come on, come on! Smaller toys up front. Woody remains lovestruck in the middle of the room.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Hey, Woody! C'mon! Woody snaps out of his trance and rushes over to the podium. The toys crowd together as Woody steps up to the podium. MIKE, a toy tape recorder, waddles up next to Woody and indicates his microphone.

speaker: MIKE
text: Ahem!

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, thanks, Mike. Okay -- SFX: FEEDBACK

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, whoa, step back -- Mike waddles back a step to stop the feedback.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hello? Check? Better? Great. Everybody hear me? Up on the shelf, can you hear me? Great! Okay, first item today...oh, yeah. Has everyone picked a moving buddy? The toys all MOAN.

speaker: HAMM
text: Moving buddy?! You can't be serious!

speaker: REX
text: Well I didn't know we were supposed to have one already.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Do we have to hold hands? The toys LAUGH and SNICKER.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, yeah, you guys think this is a big joke. We've only got one week left before the move. I don't want any toys left behind. A moving

speaker: MR. SPELL
text: You're welcome.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ok, uh...oh yes. One minor note here... Andy's birthday party's been moved to today. Next we have -- The toys all PANIC.

speaker: REX
text: What?! Whadda ya mean, the party's today?! His birthday's not 'til next week!!

speaker: HAMM
text: What's going on down there? Is Mom losing her marbles?!

speaker: WOODY
text: Well, obviously she wanted to have the party before the move. I'm not worried. You shouldn't be worried.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Of course Woody ain't worried! He's been Andy's favorite since Kindergarten!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Hey, hey! Come on, Potato Head! If Woody says it's all right, then, well, darnit, it's good enough for me. Woody has never steered us wrong before. While Slinky speaks, Potato Head takes off his mouth and mimes kissing his own butt.

speaker: WOODY
text: C'mon, guys! Every Christmas and birthday we go through this.

speaker: REX
text: But what if Andy gets another dinosaur? A mean one? I just don't think I can take that kind of rejection.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey, listen, no one's getting replaced. This is Andy we're talking about. Woody steps down from the podium and walks towards the crowd.

speaker: WOODY
text: It doesn't matter how much we're played with. What matters is that we're here for Andy when he needs us. That's what we're made for. Right? Everyone is now looking down, sheepish.

speaker: HAMM
text: Pardon me. I hate to break up the staff meeting, but, THEY'RE HERE! Birthday guests at three o'clock!

speaker: WOODY
text: Stay calm, everyone!! Too late. The toys PANIC and stampede over Woody towards the bedroom window, leaving him alone on the floor.

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh, meeting adjourned. The toys all crowd around the bedroom window, trying to get a peek outside.

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh, boy. Will ya take a look at all those presents?!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: I can't see a thing! Unable to see over the crowd, Potato Head pulls his eyes out of his head and holds them up over the other toys. ANGLE: TOY'S POV OF ANDY'S FRONT YARD CHILDREN file towards the front door carrying presents.

speaker: HAMM
text: Yessir, we're next month's garage sale fodder for sure.

speaker: REX
text: Any dinosaur-shaped ones?

speaker: HAMM
text: Ah, for crying out loud, they're all in boxes, you idiot! The presents keep coming.

speaker: REX
text: They're getting bigger.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Wait! There's a nice little one over there! At first, the kid's present appears to be a little box,

speaker: MR. SPELL
text: Spell the word "trashcan."

speaker: REX
text: We're doomed! Down on the floor, Woody smacks his hand to his forehead in surrender.

speaker: WOODY
text: Alright! Alright! The toys turn inside and look down at Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: If I send out the troops, will you all calm down?

speaker: REX
text: Yes! Yes! We promise!

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, save your batteries!

speaker: HAMM
text: Eh, very good, Woody. That's using the old noodle. Woody jumps up onto Andy's bed and turns to the Sargent on the nightstand.

speaker: WOODY
text: Sargent. Establish a recon post downstairs. Code red. You know what to do.

speaker: SARGENT
text: Yes SIR! The green army man hops down to the floor where a "BUCKET O' SOLDIERS" sits.

speaker: SARGENT
text: Alright men, you heard him. Code Red! Repeat: We are at Code Red! Recon plan Charlie. Execute! Let's move move move!! THE GREEN ARMY MEN file out of the bucket and march in formation across the bedroom floor.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Okay, c'mon kids! Everyone in the living room. It's almost time for the presents. Once Mrs. Davis and the children are out of sight, the Sargent motions to his men with a silent hand signal. TWO PARATROOPERS jump out through the railing, parachuting down to the floor below.

speaker: WOODY
text: And this -- -- is how we find out what is in those presents.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Okay, who's hungry? Here come the chips. I've got Cool Ranch and Barbeque -- The door opens and Mrs. Davis' foot comes down hard on top of a soldier.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Owww! What in the world --? Oh, I thought I told him to pick these up. With a sweep of her foot, she brushes the army men out of her path and continues on to the living room.

speaker: REX
text: Shouldn't they be there by now? What's taking them so long?!

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey, these guys are professionals. They're the best. C'mon, they're not lying down on the job.

speaker: WOUNDED SOLDIER
text: Go on without me. Just go!

speaker: SARGENT
text: A good soldier never leaves a man behind. The Sargent motions to the remaining men above. They lower themselves via jump rope, riding the baby monitor. Once downstairs, they hustle the baby monitor towards the houseplant. Suddenly...

speaker: SARGENT
text: There they are.

speaker: WOODY
text: This is it! This is it! Quiet, quiet, quiet! SARGENT Come in, Mother Bird. Alright...Andy's opening the first present now.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Mrs. Potato Head...Mrs. Potato Head...Mrs. Potato Head... Hey, I can dream, can't I? SARGENT The bow's coming off... he's ripping the wrapping paper... it's a... it's... it's a lunchbox! We've got a lunchbox, here!

speaker: WOODY
text: A lunchbox?!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: A lunchbox...?!

speaker: SLINKY
text: For lunch. Heh heh heh... SARGENT Ok, second present... it appears to be... okay, it's bed sheets.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Who invited THAT kid?!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Oh, only one left.

speaker: WOODY
text: Last present! SARGENT It's a big one... It's a... it's a boardgame! Repeat! Battleship -- Battleship, the boardgame! The toys CHEER WITH RELIEF.

speaker: HAMM
text: Yeah, alright!! Hamm gives Potato Head a congratulatory pat on the back, sending his facial features flying.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Hey, watch it!

speaker: HAMM
text: Sorry there, old Spudhead.

speaker: SARGENT
text: Mission accomplished. Well done, men. Pack it up, we're going home.

speaker: WOODY
text: So did I tell ya? Huh? Nothing to worry about.

speaker: SLINKY
text: I knew you were right all along, Woody. Never doubted you for a second.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Wait a minute. Oooh, what do we have here?! The Sargent lifts his binoculars back to his eyes. ANGLE: BINOCULAR VIEW OF LIVING ROOM Mrs. Davis can be seen opening the closet and pulling out another large present.

speaker: SARGENT
text: He's really excited about this one.

speaker: REX
text: It's a WHAT?! WHAT IS IT?!!! Rex grabs a leg of the nightstand and shakes it, making the monitor drop to the floor. The impact causes the batteries to roll out.

speaker: REX
text: Oh, no!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Oh, ya big lizard! Now we'll never know what it is!

speaker: HAMM
text: Way to go, Rex. Everyone rushes to the fallen monitor. Potato Head tries to correctly insert the batteries.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no! Turn 'em around, turn'em around!

speaker: HAMM
text: Eh, he's puttin' 'em in backwards. You're puttin' 'em in backwards!

speaker: WOODY
text: Plus is positive, minus is negative! Oh, let me! Woody jumps down off the bed and shoves both Hamm and Potato Head aside.

speaker: ANDY
text: Let's go to my room, guys! The kids rush past the houseplant.

speaker: SARGENT
text: RED ALERT! RED ALERT! ANDY IS COMING UPSTAIRS!

speaker: WOODY
text: There. SARGENT Juvenile intrusion! Repeat! Resume your positions NOW!

speaker: WOODY
text: Andy's coming, everybody! Back to your places. Hurry! The toys PANIC and scatter about the room.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Where's my ear? Who's seen my ear? Did you see my ear?

speaker: REX
text: Outta my way! Here I come, here I come -- Frantic, Rex slams into a trashcan and falls over. Everyone scurries to their places as the KID'S FOOTSTEPS grow louder. Woody falls limp in his spot on the bed just as... Andy's bedroom door flies open and a flood of children's feet rush in. FRIEND #1 Hey, look! His lasers light up.

speaker: ANDY
text: Take that, Zurg! Woody is flung off Andy's pillow and slides, unnoticed, down the gap between the bed and the back wall. FRIEND #2 Quick! Make a space! This is where the spaceship lands.

speaker: ANDY
text: -- and you press his back and he does a karate-chop action!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Come on down, guys. It's time for games! We've got prizes!

speaker: ANDY
text: Oh, yeah! The kids all run out as fast as they entered, SLAMMING THE DOOR behind them.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: What is it?

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Can you see it?

speaker: SLINKY
text: What the heck is up there?

speaker: REX
text: Woody? Who's up there with you? Woody crawls out from under the bed. The toys are shocked to discover him there.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Woody, what are you doing under the bed?

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh-h-h-h... nothing! Uh, nothing. I'm sure Andy was just a little excited, that's all. Too much cake and ice cream, I suppose. It's just a mistake.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Well, that MISTAKE is sitting in your spot, Woody.

speaker: REX
text: Have you been replaced?

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey! What did I tell you earlier? No one is getting replaced. The toys give each other a look of doubt.

speaker: WOODY
text: Now let's all be polite, and give whatever it is up there a nice, big "Andy's Room" welcome. Woody climbs slowly up the side of the bed, peeking over the edge. His eyes widen at the sight of...

speaker: BUZZ
text: Buzz Lightyear to Star Command. Come in, Star Command. Nothing. He pushes the button again.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Star Command - come in. Do you read me? Why don't they answer?!! Just then, Buzz catches sight of his ripped packaging. The box is designed to look like a spaceship.

speaker: BUZZ
text: My ship!! He runs up to the box and investigates the damage.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Blast! This'll take weeks to repair!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Buzz Lightyear Mission Log. Stardate 4072: My ship has run off course en route to sector 12. I've crash landed on a strange planet. The impact must have awoken me from hyper-sleep. Buzz springs up and down on the squishy surface of the bed.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Terrain seems a bit unstable... He taps the sticker of controls on his wrist communicator.

speaker: BUZZ
text: No read-out yet if the air is breathable... and there seems to be no sign of intelligent life anywhere -- ANGLE: BUZZ'S POV THROUGH HIS HELMET Woody's face suddenly pops into view.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hello-o-o...

speaker: BUZZ
text: HO-YAAAHH!!! Buzz jumps back, taking a fighting stance. He presses a button on his arm that turns on a red "laser beam" light on his wrist. Buzz aims the red beam on Woody's forehead and holds it there.

speaker: WOODY
text: Aaaaaaah! Whoa, hey, whoa, did I frighten you? Didn't mean to. Sorry. Howdy! My name is Woody and this is Andy's room. That's all I wanted to say, and also, there has been a bit of a mix-up. This is my spot, see, the bed here -- While Woody is speaking, Buzz notices the sheriff's badge on Woody's vest.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Local law enforcement! It's about time you got here. I'm Buzz Lightyear, Space Ranger, Universe Protection Unit. My ship has crash landed here by mistake. Buzz begins walking around the bed, surveying the situation. Woody tries to keep up.

speaker: WOODY
text: Yes, it is a mistake, because, you see, the bed, here, is my spot.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I need to repair my turbo boosters. Do you people still use fossil fuels, or have you discovered crystalic fusion?

speaker: WOODY
text: Well, let's see, we've got double A's --

speaker: BUZZ
text: Watch yourself!! Buzz shoves Woody down on the bed and re-activates his wrist laser.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Halt! Who goes there?! The other toys are peeking over the edge of the bed.

speaker: REX
text: Don't shoot! It's okay! Friends!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Do you know these life forms?

speaker: WOODY
text: Yes. They're Andy's toys.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Alright, everyone. You're clear to come up. Buzz walks over to the toys.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I am Buzz Lightyear. I come in peace. Rex steps forward and eagerly shakes Buzz's hand.

speaker: REX
text: Oh, I'm so glad you're not a dinosaur!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Why, thank you... Now thank you all for your kind welcome.

speaker: REX
text: Say! What's that button do?

speaker: BUZZ
text: I'll show you. Buzz presses a button on his chest.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Buzz Lightyear to the rescue! The toys all GASP IN AWE.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Hey, Woody's got something like that. His is a pullstring, only it --

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh yeah, but not like this one. This is a quality sound system. Probably all copper wiring, huh? So, uh, where are you from? Singapore? Hong Kong?

speaker: BUZZ
text: Well... no, actually I'm stationed up in the Gamma Quadrant of Sector 4. As a member of the elite Universe Protection Unit of the Space Ranger Corps, I protect the galaxy from the threat of invasion from the Evil Emperor Zurg, sworn enemy of the Galactic Alliance. As Buzz speaks, Woody glances down at the box in which Buzz arrived. ANGLE: BACK OF BUZZ'S BOX There is a cartoon drawing of Buzz giving the exact, word-for-word spiel that Buzz is now giving.

speaker: REX
text: And I'm from Mattel. Well, I'm not really from Mattel, I'm actually from a smaller company that was purchased in a leveraged buy-out. Well, I don't really understand the financials, but... Woody walks over to Bo Peep.

speaker: WOODY
text: You'd think they've never seen a new toy before.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Well sure, look at him. He's got more gadgets on him then a swiss army knife. Slinky presses the button on Buzz's arm, activating his laser light. Buzz quickly pulls his arm away.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Ah, ah, ah, please be careful! You don't want to be in the way when my laser goes off.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Hey, a laser! How come you don't have a laser, Woody?

speaker: WOODY
text: It's not a laser! It's a little lightbulb that blinks!

speaker: HAMM
text: What's with him?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Laser-envy.

speaker: WOODY
text: All right, that's enough. Look, we're all very impressed with Andy's new toy --

speaker: BUZZ
text: Toy?

speaker: WOODY
text: T-O-Y. Toy.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Excuse me, I think the word you're searching for is Space Ranger.

speaker: WOODY
text: The word I'm searching for I can't say because there's pre-school toys present.

speaker: REX
text: Oh, uh, Mr. Lightyear? Now I'm curious. What does a Space Ranger actually do?

speaker: WOODY
text: He's not a Space Ranger! He doesn't fight evil or shoot lasers or fly --

speaker: BUZZ
text: Excuse me. Buzz calmly hits a button and wings pop out. Again the toys GASP IN AWE.

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh, impressive wingspan. Very good!

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, what?!...What?! These are plastic. He can't fly!

speaker: BUZZ
text: They are a terillium-carbonic alloy and I CAN fly.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, you can't.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Yes, I can.

speaker: WOODY
text: You can't!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Can!

speaker: WOODY
text: Can't! Can't! Can't!

speaker: BUZZ
text: I tell you, I could fly around this room with my eyes closed!

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay then, Mr. Lightbeer! Prove it.

speaker: BUZZ
text: All right, then, I will. Stand back everyone! The crowd of toys make room for Buzz as he heads towards the edge of the bed and climbs up the bedpost. He poses like a high diver, shuts his eyes...

speaker: BUZZ
text: To infinity and beyond!! ... and leaps off the bed. Buzz plummets straight down, hits a big rubber ball and bounces right back up. He then lands on a Hotwheels car, which races him down the track, through the loop, and off a ramp. Buzz soars upward into a plane mobile hanging from the ceiling. Buzz becomes wedged between the plane's wheels. The impact turns on the PLANE'S MOTOR making it spin around and around. All the other toys watch from the bed, mesmerized. Finally the centrifugal force causes Buzz to separate from the plane, sailing him across the room toward the bed. Buzz makes a perfect landing right in front of Woody and then opens his eyes.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Can. The crowd of toys rush Buzz, CHEERING AND CLAPPING WITH

speaker: REX
text: Whoa! Oh, wow! You flew magnificently!

speaker: BO PEEP
text: I found my moving buddy!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Why, thank you. Thank you all. Thank you.

speaker: WOODY
text: That wasn't flying! That was falling with style!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Heh, heh, heh! Golly bob howdy --

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, shut up! In a couple of days, everything will be just the way it was. They'll see... they'll see. I'm still Andy's favorite toy. MONTAGE SONG: STRANGE THINGS plays over montage.

speaker: ANDY
text: Buzz Lightyear to the rescue. D) Woody observes all the cowboy-themed items in the bedroom transform to space motif: the posters, the drawings on the wall, the pillow, the bedspread. E) Buzz watches Rex execute a WIMPY ROAR. The space ranger suggests a few tips for the dinosaur. Rex tries again, this time giving a "JURASSIC PARK" ROAR. The roar blasts Potato Head's features right off his face. F) Woody passes Etch-A-Sketch, who's sporting a portrait of Buzz. Woody looks across the room to see Buzz combing Troll Doll's hair, chatting away like a hair dresser. Woody angrily shakes Etch, removing Buzz's image. G) Rocky, Snake, Troll Doll and Rex are lifting Tinkertoys as weights. Buzz works out on top of an upside down Robot, using his feet as a treadmill. Potato Head attempts to lift his Tinkertoy barbell but ends up tumbling backwards, leaving his arms connected to the barbell. H) Woody looks under the bed for Slinky, finding only the checkerboard. Woody peeks around the corner of the bed to see Slinky and Robot, under Buzz's direction, setting Buzz's "ship" up on top of ABC blocks for repair. In frustration, Woody kicks the checkerboard, sending the pieces flying. One of the checkers ricochets off the dresser and boomerangs into Woody's mouth. I) On Andy's bed, Buzz pets Slinky whose back end is stretched over to the other side where Woody sits. Slinky's wagging tail whacks Woody in the face repeatedly. Woody shoves Slinky's rear end off the bed, leaving his front end no choice but to eventually follow. J) At bedtime, Andy loads his toys into the toybox until just Woody and Buzz are left. He deliberates as to which toy to keep and which to toss into the toybox.

speaker: WOODY
text: Finally! He takes a couple DEEP BREATHS of fresh air, then discovers that his hat is missing.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey! Who's got my hat? The rubber shark pops up wearing Woody's cowboy hat.

speaker: SHARK
text: Look, I'm Woody. Howdy, howdy, howdy!

speaker: WOODY
text: Ah-hah! Ah-hah-hah! Give me that! Woody leaps out of the toy box.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Say there, Lizard and Stretchy Dog. Let me show you something. It looks as though I've been accepted into your culture. Woody looks up to see Buzz chatting with Rex and Slinky.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Your Chief, Andy, inscribed his name on me. Buzz juts his foot out so that Slinky and Rex can see the sole of his boot. The name "ANDY" is written on it in permanent marker.

speaker: SLINKY & REX
text: Wow!

speaker: REX
text: With permanent ink, too!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Well, I must get back to repairing my ship. Buzz walks away.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Don't let it get to you, Woody. Hearing Bo, Woody puts his foot back down and quickly straightens up.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: I know Andy's excited about Buzz, but you know, he'll always have a special place for you.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Yeah. Like the attic. Heh, heh...

speaker: WOODY
text: Alright! That's it! Woody angrily marches across the room. Across the room, Buzz's cardboard ship is still up on the ABC blocks. Buzz lies down on a skateboard and slides under the ship like a mechanic. Snake and Robot stand by waiting for instructions. Buzz's hand reaches out from under the ship.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Unidirectional bonding strip. Robot turns towards Snake who stands in readiness by a tape dispenser.

speaker: ROBOT
text: Mr. Lightyear wants more tape! Snake rips off a piece of tape with his mouth. Woody approaches the skateboard, grabs hold of Buzz's foot and rolls him out from under the ship.

speaker: WOODY
text: Listen, Lightsmack, you stay away from Andy. He's mine, and no one is taking him away from me.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What are you talking about? Where's that bonding strip?! Buzz rolls himself back under. Woody rolls him out again.

speaker: WOODY
text: And another thing. Stop with this Spaceman thing. It's getting on my nerves.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Are you saying you want to lodge a complaint with Star Command?

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh okay, so you want to do it the hard way, huh? Buzz stands up, face to face with Woody.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Don't even think about it, cowboy!

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, yeah, tough guy?! Woody pushes Buzz in the chest, accidentally activating a button that makes the spaceman's helmet open. Buzz grabs his neck, GASPING FOR AIR. He drops to his knees and begins to writhe on the ground, holding his breath. Woody is unsure how to react. Suddenly, Buzz SNIFFS the air.

speaker: BUZZ
text: The air isn't toxic. Buzz rises and points an accusing finger at Woody.

speaker: BUZZ
text: How dare you open a spaceman's helmet on an uncharted planet! My eyeballs could've been sucked from their sockets! Buzz closes his helmet.

speaker: WOODY
text: You actually think you're THE "Buzz Lightyear?" Oh, all this time I thought it was an act! Hey, guys! Look! It's the REAL Buzz Lightyear!

speaker: BUZZ
text: You're mocking me, aren't you?

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, no, no, no... Buzz, look! An alien!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Where? Buzz falls for the trick and turns around. Woody keels over with LAUGHTER. SFX: DOG BARKING Woody stops short. All the toys look to the bedroom window.

speaker: SID
text: Yessss! Ah, ha, ha, ha...

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh-oh. Slinky hides under the bed.

speaker: SLINKY
text: It's Sid!

speaker: REX
text: I thought he was at summer camp!

speaker: HAMM
text: They must have kicked him out early this year. The toys rush over to the window.

speaker: REX
text: Oh, no! Not Sid!

speaker: SID
text: ...Incoming! From out the window, SID PHILLIPS, a hyperactive ten- year-old, and his dog, SCUD, can be roughly made out jumping around in their backyard. A tiny figure stands isolated in the center of the yard. Sid pummels the figure with rocks while Scud strains at his leash, barking wildly.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Who is it this time?

speaker: WOODY
text: I can't tell. Hey, where's Lenny?

speaker: LENNY
text: Right here, Woody. Woody turns to see, LENNY, a pair of wind-up binoculars, approaching him from the other end of the desk. Woody picks Lenny up and looks through him to survey the scene.

speaker: REX
text: Oh, no. I can't bear to watch one of these again! ANGLE: BINOCULAR VIEW OF SID'S BACKYARD A full size toy soldier is posed in a running stance in the center of the backyard. A huge M-80 is strapped to the doll's back with masking tape.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, no... it's a Combat Carl.

speaker: SID
text: Just stay where you are, Corporal! Don't move, Carl. You'll blow up. I know you're tired! I know your leg is cramping, but you can't move. Do you hear me? Buzz breaks through the crowd.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What's going on?

speaker: WOODY
text: Nothing that concerns you spacemen. Just us TOYS.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I'd better take a look anyway. Buzz grabs Lenny from Woody and looks through him.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Why is that soldier strapped to an explosive device?

speaker: WOODY
text: That's why. Sid. ANGLE: BINOCULAR VIEW OF THE DOG, SCUD

speaker: BUZZ
text: Sure is a hairy fellah.

speaker: WOODY
text: No! No, that's Scud, you idiot! Again, Woody readjusts Buzz's view. ANGLE: BINOCULAR VIEW OF SID He is sporting a skull t-shirt and LAUGHING HIDEOUSLY.

speaker: WOODY
text: THAT is Sid!

speaker: BUZZ
text: You mean that happy child?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: That ain't no happy child.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Well, then we've got to do something! Buzz steps up onto the window ledge. The toys GASP IN

speaker: BO PEEP
text: What are you doing?!! Get down from there!

speaker: BUZZ
text: I'm going to go teach that boy a lesson.

speaker: WOODY
text: Yeah, sure. You go ahead. Melt him with your scary laser. Woody presses Buzz's laser button. It emits a WIMPY ELECTRONIC BEEP. Buzz quickly pulls his arm away.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Be careful with that, it's extremely dangerous. While Woody and Buzz banter, Lenny witnesses Sid lighting the fuse of the M80.

speaker: LENNY
text: He's lighting it! He's lighting it!

speaker: SID
text: NO-O-O-O-O!!! CA-A-A-A-A-ARL!

speaker: LENNY
text: Hit the dirt! The toys jump away from the window. SFX: EXPLOSION Dirt clods and toy shrapnel rain down along the side of Andy's house.

speaker: SID
text: Yes! He's gone! He's history! Andy's toys peek over the window sill. ANGLE: SID'S YARD A large black scorch mark is all that remains where Combat Carl once stood. Sid jumps up and down victoriously while Scud resumes his BARKING.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I could have stopped him.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz, I would love to see you try. 'Course I'd love to see you as a crater. Sid CACKLES and dances around the crater.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: The sooner we move the better.

speaker: ANDY
text: To infinity and beyond!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Oh, all this packing makes me hungry. What would you say to dinner at, uh, oh, Pizza Planet?

speaker: ANDY
text: Pizza Planet?! Oh, cool! Andy throws the two toys on his desk with Buzz landing right on top of Woody.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Go wash your hands and I'll get Molly ready. The minute the door is closed Woody comes alive and shoves Buzz off of him.

speaker: ANDY
text: Can I bring some toys?

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: You can bring ONE toy...

speaker: ANDY
text: Just one? Woody perks up with concern.

speaker: WOODY
text: One toy? He glances over his shoulder at Buzz, who is walking away towards the opposite end of the desk. Woody picks up a Magic 8 Ball left beside him on the desk. With his back to Buzz, Woody quietly shakes the 8 ball.

speaker: WOODY
text: Will Andy pick me? He tips the 8 ball over. The triangular oracle floats up to the surface. Its prediction reads: DON'T COUNT

speaker: WOODY
text: Don't count on it?!! Doh-h-h-h! Woody throws down the 8 ball in disgust. It rolls across the desk and falls behind it with a LOUD THUD. Woody suddenly becomes interested in the back of the desk and peers down it. ANGLE: BACK OF THE DESK The 8 ball is wedged way down near the bottom. The space is a black chasm, dark and deep, just big enough to fit...a toy. Woody looks across the desk at Buzz He is HUMMING TO HIMSELF as he forages through Andy's pen/pencil tray looking for "tools" to repair his ship with. Right behind Buzz sits

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz!! Oh, Buzz, Buzz Lightyear!! Buzz Lightyear, thank goodness! We've got trouble!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Trouble?! Where?!

speaker: WOODY
text: Down there. Just down there. A helpless toy... it's.... it's trapped, Buzz!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Then we've no time to lose!! Buzz runs over and looks down the back of the desk.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I don't see anything! Woody picks up the remote for the RC Car and switches it on. RC's eyes open sleepily.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, he's there. Just, just keep looking. Woody hits the "FORWARD" button on the remote and steers the RC Car straight for Buzz.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What kind of a toy --? Buzz turns to see RC headed straight for him. He dives out of the way as the RC Car SMASHES into the base of...

speaker: TOYS
text: BUZZ!!!!

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz!!! Woody looks out the window. No sign of Buzz. All the other toys rush over to the sill.

speaker: SLINKY
text: I don't see him in the driveway! I think he bounced into Sid's yard. Woody backs away from the COMMOTION, unnoticed.

speaker: REX
text: Buzz!

speaker: RC CAR
text: Whirrr!! Whirrrr-whirrrr!!! Rex looks over at RC. The remote control car is bouncing up and down excitedly.

speaker: REX
text: Hey everyone! RC's trying to say something! The toys turn from the window to RC.

speaker: REX
text: What is it, boy?

speaker: RC CAR
text: Whirrr!!! Whirrr! Whirrrrrr!!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: He's sayin' that this was no accident.

speaker: TOYS
text: Huh?

speaker: BO PEEP
text: What do you mean?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: I mean Humpty Dumpty was pushed... ...by Woody.

speaker: TOYS
text: WHAT?!? The toys turn to Woody who suddenly realizes how this looks.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: That's Mr. Potato Head to you, you back-stabbin' murderer!

speaker: WOODY
text: Now, it was an accident! Guys, c'mon now, you...you gotta believe me.

speaker: SLINKY
text: We believe you, Woody. Right, Rex?

speaker: REX
text: Oh, I don't like confrontations. The Sargent pops out of the army bucket next to Woody.

speaker: SARGENT
text: Where is your honor, dirtbag?! You are an absolute disgrace! You don't deserve to -- Woody seals the lid back on the bucket. Potato Head starts closing in on Woody.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Couldn't handle Buzz cuttin' in on your playtime, could ya Woody? Didn't want to face the fact that Buzz just might be Andy's new favorite toy, so you got rid of him. Well, what if Andy starts playin' with me more, Woody, huh? You gonna knock me outta the window, too? Potato Head has driven Woody back to the very edge of

speaker: HAMM
text: I don't think we should give him the chance. Suddenly, the lid pops off the bucket of army men.

speaker: SARGENT
text: There he is, men! Frag him! The army men yell CHARGE and pounce on Woody, while all the rest of the toys close in.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Let's string him up by his pull- string!

speaker: HAMM
text: I got dibs on his hat!

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Would you boys stop it?!

speaker: HAMM
text: Tackle him!

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no, no, no! Wait! Wait I can explain everything ----

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Andy, c'mon!

speaker: ANDY
text: Okay, Mom, be right down. I've got to get Buzz.

speaker: SARGENT
text: Retreat! The toys all drop Woody and rush back to their places. Andy enters the room and heads straight for the desk where Woody is lying. Andy overlooks Woody and begins searching around the room.

speaker: ANDY
text: Mom! Do you know where Buzz is?

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: No, I haven't seen him. Woody painfully watches as Andy searches in vain for Buzz.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Psssst! Woody looks across the room. Potato Head and Etch-A-Sketch peek out of a packing box. Etch-A-Sketch scribbles a hangman's noose while Potato Head points an accusing finger in Woody's direction. Woody GULPS.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Andy! I'm heading out the door.

speaker: ANDY
text: But Mom, I can't find him!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Well, honey, just grab some other toy! Now c'mon!

speaker: ANDY
text: Okay... He grabs Woody and walks out of the room.

speaker: ANDY
text: I couldn't find my Buzz. I know I left him right there.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Honey, I'm sure he's around. You'll find him.

speaker: SLINKY
text: It's too short! We need more monkeys!

speaker: REX
text: There aren't any more! That's the whole barrel. Rex throws the barrel down and runs back to the ledge.

speaker: REX
text: Buzz! The monkeys aren't working! We're formulating another plan! Stay calm! Oh, where could he be?

speaker: ANDY
text: Can I help pump the gas?

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Sure! I'll even let you drive. Both Mrs. Davis and Andy exit the van while baby Molly sleeps up front in her car seat.

speaker: ANDY
text: Yeah?!

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, great. How am I gonna convince those guys it was an accident? Suddenly, Buzz appears over the edge of the sun roof.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! Buzz jumps down on the back seat to face Woody. He is furious.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! You're alive! This is great! Oh, I'm saved! I'm saved! Andy'll find you here, he'll take us back to the room, and then you can tell everyone that this was all just a big mistake. Huh? No response from Buzz. Just an angry stare.

speaker: WOODY
text: Right? Buddy?

speaker: BUZZ
text: I just want you to know that even though you tried to terminate me, revenge is not an idea we promote on my planet.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh. Oh, that's good.

speaker: BUZZ
text: But we're not on my planet, are we?

speaker: WOODY
text: No. Buzz lunges for Woody. The two toys fly off the seat and out the open side door of the van.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ok! Come on! You want a piece of me?! Buzz lands a punch that sends Woody's head spinning around. Woody lunges with all his might. He smacks Buzz in the face, making it SQUEAK with every blow. Buzz closes his helmet on Woody's hand.

speaker: WOODY
text: Owwwww!!! Woody pounds on Buzz's chest with his free hand, activating BUZZ'S SAMPLED VOICE buttons. SFX: CAR DOOR SLAM The toys stop fighting. Before they can react...

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Next stop...

speaker: ANDY
text: Pizza Planet! Yeah!!! The van drives off.

speaker: WOODY
text: Andy?! Woody starts to run in the direction of the van but it drives out of sight, leaving Buzz and Woody stranded.

speaker: WOODY
text: Doesn't he realize that I'm not there? I'm LOST! Oh, I'm a lost toy! Meanwhile, Buzz checks the surroundings. He flips open his wrist communicator.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Buzz Lightyear Mission Log. The local Sheriff and I seem to be at a huge refueling station of some sort -- Woody whips around, his expression changing from panic to seething anger. He charges at Buzz.

speaker: WOODY
text: You! SFX: LOUD TRUCK HORN Just then the toys are bathed in the headlight beams of a behemoth tanker truck pulling into the station. Buzz dives off to the side while Woody collapses right where he stands on the pavement. The truck ROARS over him,

speaker: BUZZ
text: According to my nava-computer, the --

speaker: WOODY
text: Shut up! Just shut up, you idiot!!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Sheriff, this is no time to panic.

speaker: WOODY
text: This is the perfect time to panic! I'm lost, Andy is gone, they're going to move from their house in two days and it's all your fault!!

speaker: BUZZ
text: My fault?! If you hadn't pushed me out of the window in the first place --

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, yeah? Well, if YOU hadn't shown up in your stupid little cardboard spaceship and taken away everything that was important to me --

speaker: BUZZ
text: Don't talk to me about importance. Because of YOU the security of this entire universe is in jeopardy.

speaker: WOODY
text: WHAT?!! What are you talking about?! Buzz walk to the edge of the truck tire and points up to the stars.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Right now, poised at the edge of the galaxy, Emperor Zurg has been secretly building a weapon with the destructive capacity to annihilate an entire planet. I alone have information that reveals this weapon's only weakness.

speaker: BUZZ
text: And you, my friend, are responsible for delaying my rendez-vous with Star Command, Woody explodes.

speaker: WOODY
text: YOU ARE A TOY!!! You aren't the real Buzz Lightyear, you're an action figure!! You are a child's plaything!!! Beat.

speaker: BUZZ
text: You are a sad strange little man and you have my pity. Farewell. Buzz walks off.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, yeah? Well, good riddance, ya looney! Woody walks away in the opposite direction.

speaker: WOODY
text: Rendez-vous with Star Command. SFX: SCREECHING TIRES FOLLOWED BY GAS STATION BELL

speaker: PIZZA DELIVERER
text: Hey, Gas Dude!

speaker: ATTENDANT
text: You talkin' to me?

speaker: PIZZA DELIVERER
text: Yeah, man, can you help me? Do you know where Cutting Blvd. is?

speaker: ATTENDANT
text: Just a moment... Woody looks in the direction of the bell. His face lights up at the sight of...

speaker: WOODY
text: Pizza Planet... Andy! Woody takes a step forward and then stops.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, no! I can't show my face in that room without Buzz. Woody runs back under the tanker truck. Buzz is at the far end of the truck, walking away from Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! Buzz, come back!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Go away. Woody looks back at the delivery truck in desperation and then eyes... ANGLE: DELIVERY TRUCK ROOF SIGN Atop the truck is a rocket with the Pizza Planet logo.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, Buzz, you've gotta come back. I found a spaceship! Buzz stops walking away and looks back at Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: It's a spaceship, Buzz!

speaker: PIZZA DELIVERER
text: C'mon, man, hurry up. Um, like the Pizza's are getting cold here. Woody and Buzz eye the parked delivery truck from within the safety of a nearby oilcan display.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Now you're sure this spacefreighter will return to its port of origin once it jettisons its food supply?

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh-huh. And when we get there, we'll be able to find a way to transport you... home.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Well, then let's climb aboard. Buzz makes a beeline for the passenger side door of the pizza truck. Woody chases after him.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no, no, wait, Buzz, Buzz, let's get in the back. No one will see us there.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Negative. There are no restraining harnesses in the cargo area. We'll be much safer in the cockpit. In a flash, Buzz has scaled the front tire, grabbed the rear view mirror, and swung himself up and into the cab.

speaker: WOODY
text: Yeah, but, Buzz! Buzz!

speaker: PIZZA DELIVERER
text: Ok, so that's two lefts, and then a right, huh?

speaker: ATTENDANT
text: Yeah.

speaker: PIZZA DELIVERER
text: Okay, thanks for the directions.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! SFX: ENGINE STARTING Woody runs around to the back of the truck, scrambles up the bumper and throws open the back hatch to climb inside. Woody lets out a YELL, as the back hatch slams back down on his rear, sending him flying into the bed of the truck.

speaker: WOODY
text: It'll be safer in the cockpit than the cargo bay. What an idiot! The driver shifts into gear and hits the gas, propelling Woody to the back of the truck. The pizza deliverer drives like a maniac, taking sharp turns and hills at high speeds. Woody is helplessly thrown around the truck. With every blow, Woody YELPS in pain. The truck climbs a steep hill. Woody looks up just in time to see...

speaker: ROBOT GUARDS
text: You are clear to enter. Welcome to Pizza Planet. VARIOUS ANNOUNCEMENTS blare out from speakers:

speaker: MALE VOICE OVER SPEAKER
text: Next shuttle lift-off scheduled for T-minus 30 minutes and counting...

speaker: FEMALE VOICE OVER SPEAKER
text: The white zone is for eating pizza only. The white zone is for... Excited, Buzz pries open the window between the cab and truck bed.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Sheriff! Woody is gone. Just the toolbox and strewn trash.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Sheriff? The toolbox falls on its side revealing Woody. He peels off the back of the truck and falls into a pile of trash.

speaker: BUZZ
text: There you are. Now the entrance is heavily guarded. We need a way to get inside. Woody rises from the trash with a "MEGA-GULP" cup on his head.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Great idea, Woody! I like your thinking!

speaker: ROBOT GUARDS
text: You are clear to enter. Welcome to Pizza Planet. The front doors automatically swing open as the people

speaker: WOODY
text: Ow! Watch where you're going!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Sorry. They sneak in between two long rows of video games and throw off their disguises. They then take a good look at...

speaker: BUZZ
text: What a space port. Good work, Woody. Woody is busy looking at all the children in the arcade, but none of the kids look familiar to him. Just then he

speaker: ANDY
text: Mom, can I play Black Hole? Please, please, please?! Woody turns around and through the video games he spots...

speaker: ANDY
text: standing with Mom and Molly in her stroller.

speaker: WOODY
text: Andy!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: What's Black Hole?

speaker: ANDY
text: Oh, it's so cool... The family begins to walk away.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Now we need to find a ship that's headed for Sector 12 -- Buzz is about to head off in the opposite direction when Woody grabs him and quickly pulls him down the video corridor.

speaker: WOODY
text: Wait a minute! No Buzz! This way! There's a special ship. I just saw it!

speaker: BUZZ
text: You mean it has hyperdrive?

speaker: WOODY
text: Hyper-active hyperdrive, and astro... uh, turf. The toys manage to get ahead of Andy. Woody peeks around the corner of one of the video games and waits for Mom and Andy to approach.

speaker: WOODY
text: C'mon, c'mon, that's it...

speaker: BUZZ
text: Where is it? I don't see the -- Buzz stops short at the sight of...

speaker: BUZZ
text: Spaceship.

speaker: WOODY
text: Alright Buzz, get ready... Buzz heads for the crane game, but Woody does not notice, his eyes locked on the approaching stroller.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, Buzz, when I say "go," we're gonna jump in the basket -- Woody turns and realizes Buzz is gone. He looks across the way just in time to see Buzz leap into the crane game through the "PRIZE" slot.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz!! Woody turns back in the direction of the stroller. It has already gone past.

speaker: WOODY
text: Dooh! No! This cannot be happening to me!! Woody runs towards the crane game, but is forced to hold back for a moment as some SCREAMING children pass by.

speaker: ALIENS
text: Oo-o-o-o-o-o...

speaker: BUZZ
text: Greetings! I am Buzz Lightyear! I come in peace!

speaker: ALIENS
text: Tell us! What is it like outside? The squeeze toys rush Buzz like JABBERING excited children.

speaker: BUZZ
text: This is an intergalactic emergency! I need to commandeer your vessel to Sector 12! Woody peeks over the partition to witness Buzz surrounded by the cute alien toys.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Who's in charge here? All the aliens point upward.

speaker: ALIENS
text: The cla-a-a-a-a-a-a-w!! Woody and Buzz look up. ANGLE: CRANE GAME CLAW It dangles directly above the toys. ALIEN #1 The claw is our master. ALIEN #2 The claw chooses who will go and who will stay.

speaker: WOODY
text: This is ludicrous.

speaker: SID
text: Woody GASPS at the recognition of Sid's voice. He turns to see Sid heading straight for the crane game.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, no! Sid!!! Woody leaps off the partition and tackles Buzz, pushing the two of them deep into the pile of aliens.

speaker: WOODY
text: Get down!! Sid approaches the crane game and fishes quarters out of his pants pocket.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What's gotten into you, Sheriff? I was --

speaker: WOODY
text: YOU are the one that decided to climb into this -- ALIEN #4 Sh-h-h-h-h-h. The claw. It moves. ANGLE: CRANE It moves into position and hovers directly above the area where Woody and Buzz are hiding. The crane drops and grabs hold of the alien toy that is right on top of Buzz. ALIEN #3 I have been chosen!! Positioned with his back to Sid, the alien is lifted up by the claw. ALIEN #3 Farewell, my friends! I go on to a better place.

speaker: SID
text: Gotcha! With the alien gone, Buzz's upper torso becomes exposed, forcing the space ranger to freeze. Sid suddenly spots Buzz.

speaker: SID
text: A Buzz Lightyear! No way! Woody, still hidden, frantically looks around for some way to escape. Behind him, through the aliens, he eyes...

speaker: SID
text: Yes! The claw begins to lift Buzz up.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz, NO! Woody grabs hold of Buzz's feet. Woody and the claw begin to have a tug-of-war with Buzz. Woody pulls down hard, forcing Buzz to sink into the pile of aliens, out of Sid's view.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey! What are you doing? ALIEN #5 He must go.

speaker: ALIENS
text: He must go! Do not fight the claw! Do not anger the claw! He has been chosen. Woody and Buzz are pushed up to the surface and into the air, dangling lifelessly in front of Sid.

speaker: SID
text: Alright! Double prizes! Woody and Buzz are dropped into the prize slot and snatched up by Sid.

speaker: SID
text: Let's go home and...play. Ha-ha-ha. ANGLE: CLOSEUP OF SKULL ON SID'S T-SHIRT

speaker: BUZZ
text: Sheriff! I can see your dwelling from here! You're almost home.

speaker: ALIEN
text: Nirvana is coming! The mystic portal awaits!

speaker: WOODY
text: Will you be quiet?!! You guys don't get it, do you? Once we go into Sid's house, we won't be coming out. ANGLE: TOYS' POV FROM OUT BACKPACK The front door opens to reveal Scud. The dog lunges straight for the backpack, BARKING.

speaker: SID
text: Whoa, Scud! Hey, boy. Sit! Good boy! The dog begrudgingly obeys.

speaker: SID
text: Hey, I got somethin' for ya, boy. Sid's hand reaches into the backpack.

speaker: WOODY
text: FREEZE!!! The toys go still. Sid's hand grabs the alien out of the backpack. The alien is then placed sideways along Scud's snout.

speaker: SID
text: Ready, set, NOW. In one quick motion, Scud flips the alien up, catches it in his mouth, and rabidly shakes it back and forth. Buzz and Woody react in horror.

speaker: SID
text: Hannah! Hey, Hannah!!! Woody and Buzz glance up to see HANNAH, Sid's frail little sister, carrying her Janie Doll.

speaker: HANNAH
text: What?

speaker: SID
text: Did I get my package in the mail?

speaker: HANNAH
text: I dunno.

speaker: SID
text: Whaddaya mean, you don't know?

speaker: HANNAH
text: I don't know!

speaker: SID
text: Oh no, Hannah!

speaker: HANNAH
text: What?

speaker: SID
text: Look! Janie! He grabs the doll.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Hey!!

speaker: SID
text: She's sick!

speaker: HANNAH
text: No she's NOT --

speaker: SID
text: I'll have to perform one of my... operations!

speaker: HANNAH
text: NO-O-O... Don't touch her! NO! Sid bolts upstairs with Hannah in pursuit.

speaker: WOODY
text: Not Sid's room... not there...

speaker: HANNAH
text: Sid! Give her back! Sid just LAUGHS. He charges into the room and slams the door in his sister's face.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Sid! Sid!... Sid carelessly tosses the backpack on the bed and walks over to a makeshift workbench. SID Oh, no. We have a sick patient here, nurse. Prepare the O.R., STAT! Sid CLICKS on a bare bulb dangling above his "operating table." Woody and Buzz look on from the safety of the backpack as Sid places the Janie doll's head in a vise.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Sid, give her back! Give her back now! I'm telling! SID Patient is... ... pre-e-epped. Sid grabs a painter's mask from his toolchest and dons it like a surgeon's mask. SID No one's ever attempted a double bypass brain transplant before. Sid grabs a toy pterodactyl from a nearby crate full of junk. SID

speaker: BUZZ
text: I don't believe that man's ever been to medical school. Sid struggles for a moment with his "patient" then stops. SID Doctor, you've done it! Hannah? He opens the door. Hannah is standing there, looking worried.

speaker: SID
text: Janie's all better now.

speaker: HANNAH
text: MOM!! MOM!!

speaker: SID
text: She's lying! Whatever she says it's not true! Sid throws the doll to the ground and runs after Hannah, slamming the door behind him. Woody and Buzz peer out of the backpack at their new surroundings. Heavy metal posters, discarded toy remains and power tools adorn the messy room. They are in Hell...toy Hell.

speaker: WOODY
text: We are gonna die. I'm outta here! Woody leaps from the bed to the doorknob and struggles to open it. No good. Woody drops to the floor.

speaker: WOODY
text: Locked! There's gotta be another way out of here. SFX: ROLLING SOUND Woody is startled by the noise. A small yo-yo rolls out from behind a box and falls on its side. Spooked, Woody grabs a pencil from the floor and brandishes it like a weapon. Just then a shadow passes by Woody. He turns quickly but sees nothing.

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh...Buzz? Was that you? Woody hurriedly trades his pencil for a larger flashlight. He hears A NOISE from under Sid's' bed. Woody turns on the flashlight and shines the beam in the direction of the noise, illuminating...

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey! Hi, there, little fellah! Come out here. Do you know a way out of here? The baby doll moves out from under the bed, revealing a one-eyed doll head atop a spider-like body made of erector set pieces.

speaker: WOODY
text: The creature extends its legs and rises up taller than Woody. Scared speechless, Woody keeps his flashlight beam locked on BABYFACE. Various other MUTANT TOYS begin to emerge from the shadows: a toy fishing pole with fashion doll legs, a skateboard with a combat soldier's torso screwed to the front end, a jack-in-the-box with a rubber hand for a head, . Woody leaps onto the bed and hides behind Buzz.

speaker: WOODY
text: B-B-B-Buzz! Buzz and Woody look on as the mutants have a tug of war as they grab all the Janie and pterodactyl parts, dragging them off into the shadows.

speaker: BUZZ
text: They're cannibals! Woody retreats back into the backpack.

speaker: BUZZ
text: May day! May day! Come in, Star Command! Send reinforcements!... Star Command, do you copy? No response. Buzz adjusts his laser light. It emits a short BLIP.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I've set my laser from stun to kill.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, great, great. Yeah, and if anyone attacks us we can blink 'em to death.

speaker: REX
text: Hey, you guys! I think I've found him. Buzz! Is that you?! Rex points the flashlight beam at the shaking bushes. The annoyed MEOW of a cat is heard.

speaker: REX
text: Whiskers! Will you get out of here?! You're interfering with the search and rescue. SFX: APPROACHING CAR Rex turns off the flashlight.

speaker: REX
text: Look! They're home! The toys duck behind the sill. The Davis' family van pulls into the driveway. Andy and Mrs. Davis get out.

speaker: ANDY
text: Mom, have you seen Woody?

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Where was the last place you left him?

speaker: ANDY
text: Right here in the van.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Oh, I'm sure he's there. You're just not looking hard enough.

speaker: ANDY
text: He's not here, Mom. Woody's gone. The toys all look at one another.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Woody's gone?!

speaker: HAMM
text: Well waddah-ya-know, the weasel ran away. Hamm, Potato Head and Rex walk away from the window.

speaker: REX
text: Who would've thought he was capable of such atrocities?! Bo Peep and Slinky are left alone at the window, visibly crestfallen.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Oh, Slink, I hope he's okay.

speaker: SID
text: Well, we have ways of making you talk. Sid pulls out a magnifying glass from his back pocket and focuses the beam on Woody's forehead. SID Where are your rebel friends now? Heh, heh. A bright white hot dot forms on Woody's forehead and begins to smolder.

speaker: SID'S MOM
text: Sid!! Your pop-tarts are ready! Sid pulls the magnifying glass away.

speaker: SID
text: Alright!! Sid runs out of the room. As soon as he's gone, Woody jumps up SCREAMING, his forehead burning. He runs to a bowl of half-eaten cereal on the floor, and dunks his head in. Buzz runs over to Woody, pausing to remove two suction cup darts from his person before pulling Woody out of the bowl. Two colorful Froot-Loops stick to each of Woody's eyes like glasses.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Are you alright? I'm proud of you, Sheriff. A lesser man would have talked under such torture. Woody looks at his reflection in the back of the cereal spoon and rubs the burn mark on his forehead,

speaker: WOODY
text: I sure hope this isn't permanent.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Still no word from Star Command. We're not that far from the spaceport -- Woody's eyes light up. ANGLE: SPOON Sid's bedroom door can be seen in the reflection. It's open.

speaker: WOODY
text: The door! It's open! We're free!! Woody runs for the door. Buzz follows.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody, we don't know what's out there!

speaker: WOODY
text: They're gonna eat us, Buzz!! Do something! Quick!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Shield your eyes! Buzz fires his laser at them. The little red beam just flickers against Babyface's head. The mutant toys look confusedly at each other.

speaker: BUZZ
text: It's not working. I recharged it before I left. It should be good for hours --

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, you idiot! You're a toy! Use your karate chop action! Grabbing Buzz like a hostage, Woody fends off the mutant toys by pushing a large button on Buzz's back, making Buzz's arm involuntarily "chop" up and down.

speaker: WOODY
text: Get away! Hoo-cha! Hoo-cha!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Hey!! Hey! How are you doing that? Stop that!

speaker: WOODY
text: Back! Back, you savages! Back! Woody circles around the mutant toys to the open doorway, continually chopping Buzz's arm.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody, stop it!!

speaker: WOODY
text: Sorry guys, but dinner's canceled! Woody drops Buzz and runs out the door.

speaker: WOODY
text: There's no place like home. There's no place like home. There's no place like home... ... turns onto the top of the stairwell, down a few steps, and is confronted by...

speaker: BUZZ
text: Another stunt like that, cowboy -- you're going to get us killed.

speaker: WOODY
text: Don't tell me what to do!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Shhh! Buzz checks to make sure Scud is still asleep and then darts across the stairwell opening to the other end of the hallway. Once safely across, he motions for Woody to follow. Woody cowardly crawls on all fours across the open area and meets up with Buzz. As he stands...

speaker: WOODY
text: YEEEEEEE-HAAAAAAA!! Both Buzz and Woody leap in surprise at the sound of Woody's voice box. ANGLE: SCUD'S EYE. It opens. Woody vainly attempts to stifle the recoiling pullstring.

speaker: WOODY
text: Gidy-up partner!... GROWLING, Scud starts up the stairs.

speaker: WOODY
text: ... We got to get this wagon train a movin'! Woody and Buzz take off running.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Split up! Two doors are ajar at the other end of the hallway. Buzz dives behind one while Woody jumps into...

speaker: BUZZ
text: Star Command! Buzz opens up his wrist communicator and is just about to speak into it when he is interrupted. KID #1 Buzz Lightyear responding! Read you loud and clear! Buzz turns around to see...

speaker: SPACE COMMANDER
text: Buzz Lightyear, Planet Earth needs your help! KID #1 On the way!!

speaker: MALE CHORUS
text: BUZZ LIGHTYEAR!!! Buzz reacts with confusion at what he is watching. He walks slowly towards the television set.

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: The world's greatest superhero! Now the world's greatest TOY! ANGLE: TV COMMERCIAL The Buzz Lightyear doll is now out of the box and being displayed.

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: Buzz has it all! Locking wrist communicator! KID #1 Calling Buzz Lightyear.

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: Karate chop action! KID #2 Wow! With every feature demonstrated on the TV, Buzz compares the same feature on himself.

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: Pulsating laserlight! KID #2 Total annihilation!

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: Multi-phrase voice simulator!

speaker: TV BUZZ
text: It's a secret mission in uncharted space! Buzz presses the same button on his uniform.

speaker: BUZZ
text: It's a secret mission in uncharted space.

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: And best of all... HIGH-PRESSURE-SPACE-WINGS!!

speaker: TV BUZZ
text: To Infinity and Beyond! On the TV screen, the Buzz Lightyear action figure appears to be launched through the air. The words: NOT A FLYING TOY flash across the bottom of the screen.

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: Not a flying toy. Buzz slowly shakes his head in wide-eyed disbelief.

speaker: TV ANNOUNCER
text: Get your Buzz Lightyear action figure and save a galaxy near you!

speaker: MALE CHORUS
text: BUZZ LIGHTYEAR!!! The image on the screen changes to a shot of hundreds of Buzzes in their boxes lining either side of a store aisle.

speaker: LOCAL ANNOUNCER
text: Available at all Al's Toy Barn outlets in the tri-county area. Buzz is stricken. He looks down at his wrist communicator and opens it. ANGLE: WRIST COMMUNICATOR Molded on the underside of the cover are three words: "MADE IN TAIWAN". SONG: "I WILL GO SAILING NO MORE" BEGINS

speaker: WOODY
text: You are a toy! You can't fly! Buzz bows his head, defeated.

speaker: BUZZ
text: To Infinity and Beyond! Buzz leaps off the banister... and falls. In SLOW MOTION Buzz watches his square of blue sky pull farther away from him as he plummets to the floor below.

speaker: HANNAH
text: M-o-o-om? Mom, have you seen my Sally doll? Hannah walks into the entryway, and not seeing Buzz, steps on him.

speaker: MOM
text: What, dear? What was that? Hannah picks up Buzz and smiles.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Nevermind.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oo-o-of! Buzz?! The coast is clear. Buzz? Where are you?

speaker: BUZZ
text: It's a secret mission in uncharted space! Let's go!! Woody creeps down the hallway, dragging the Christmas lights with him.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Really? That is so-o-o interesting. Woody peeks into the open doorway of...

speaker: BUZZ
text: He is seated at the miniature table, dressed up in a frilly apron and fashionable party hat.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Would you like some tea, Mrs. Nesbit?

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! Hannah has placed a tiny teapot in Buzz's severed arm and pours imaginary tea with it.

speaker: HANNAH
text: It's so nice you could join us on such late notice. Woody steps back into the hallway.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, no!

speaker: HANNAH
text: What a lovely hat, Mrs. Nesbit. It goes quite well with your head. Woody thinks for a moment, then takes a few steps further down the hall. He CLEARS HIS THROAT.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hannah! Oh, Hannah! Hannah stops pouring tea and looks up.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Mom? Please excuse me, ladies. I'll be right back. As soon as Hannah exits the room Buzz keels over face- down onto the table. Hannah passes Woody, hidden in the Christmas lights, and walks downstairs.

speaker: HANNAH
text: What is it, Mom? Mom, where are you? Woody bolts into Hannah's room.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! Hey, Buzz! Are you okay? Buzz lifts his head up and wails in drunken despair.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Gone! It's all go-o-one! All of it's gone. Bye-bye! Whoo-hoo! See ya! Woody picks up Buzz's severed arm.

speaker: WOODY
text: What happened to you?

speaker: BUZZ
text: One minute you're defending the whole galaxy... ... and suddenly you find yourself suckin' down Darjeeling with Marie Antoinette and her little sisters. The headless dolls turn and wave. Woody removes the teapot from the severed arm and sets it on the table.

speaker: WOODY
text: I think you've had enough tea for today. Let's get you out of here, Buzz.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Don't you get it?! You see the hat? I am Mrs. Nesbit!!

speaker: WOODY
text: Snap out of it, Buzz! Woody presses Buzz's helmet open, slaps him across the face with his own detached arm, and then politely closes the helmet. Buzz sobers up and calmly takes his severed arm from Woody. Buzz walks out of the room while Woody follows.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I'm sorry. You're right.

speaker: BUZZ
text: ...I'm just a little depressed, that's all. I can get through this. Buzz reaches the center of the hallway and drops to his knees.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Oh, I'm a sham!!

speaker: WOODY
text: Sh-h-h-h-h!! Quiet, Buzz.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Look at me! I can't even fly out of a window! Woody stops short. He looks down the hallway in the direction of Sid's room. ANGLE: SID'S BEDROOM WINDOW Woody can see straight out Sid's window across the way to Andy's bedroom window.

speaker: WOODY
text: Out the window... Buzz, you're a genius! Woody grabs the coil of Christmas lights and drags Buzz towards Sid's room.

speaker: WOODY
text: Come on, this way!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Years of Academy training... wasted!!

speaker: HAMM
text: Miss. G-6.

speaker: MR POTATO HEAD
text: Ohhh! You sunk it!

speaker: HAMM
text: Heh-heh.

speaker: MR POTATO HEAD
text: Are you peeking?

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh, quit your whining and pay up. Potato Head reaches for his ear.

speaker: HAMM
text: No, no, not the ear. Gimme the nose. C'mon!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: How 'bout three out of five? He is about to hand his nose over to Hamm when...

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey guys! Guys! Hey! Both toys look across the way.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Son of a building block, it's Woody!

speaker: HAMM
text: He's in the psycho's bedroom!

speaker: WOODY
text: Hi!

speaker: HAMM
text: Everyone, it's Woody!

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Woody?!

speaker: REX
text: You're kidding?

speaker: SLINKY
text: Woody?!

speaker: WOODY
text: We're gonna get outta here, Buzz -- Buzz? Buzz is not there. Woody looks down at the floor. Buzz is sitting on the floor, playing "bombs away" with his broken arm.

speaker: REX
text: Hey, look!

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Woody!

speaker: WOODY
text: Boy, am I glad to see you guys!

speaker: SLINKY
text: I knew you'd come back, Woody!

speaker: BO PEEP
text: What are doing over there?

speaker: WOODY
text: It's a long story, Bo. I'll explain later. Here, catch this! Woody tosses one end of the Christmas lights over. Slinky catches them.

speaker: SLINKY
text: I got it, Woody!

speaker: REX
text: He got it, Woody!

speaker: WOODY
text: Good going, Slink! Now, just, just tie it on to something!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Hey?!!

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Potato Head!?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Did you all take stupid pills this morning?! Have you forgotten what he did to Buzz? And now you want to let him back over here?

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no, no! You got it all wrong, Potato Head. Buzz is fine! Buzz is right here. He's with me!

speaker: WOODY
text: No I'm not! Buzz, come over here and you just tell the nice toys that you're not dead. ANGLE: BUZZ He doesn't respond, preoccupied with peeling off the sticker on his wrist communicator. He crumples it up and tosses it aside.

speaker: WOODY
text: Just a sec.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! Will you get up here and give me a hand?! Buzz's severed arm comes flying into view and lands by Woody's feet.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ha ha. That's very funny, Buzz. This is serious!!

speaker: REX
text: Hey, Woody!? Where'd ya' go?

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, hi Buzz! Why don't you say "hello" to the guys over there?

speaker: REX
text: Hey look! It's Buzz!

speaker: WOODY
text: Yeah, hey Buzz. Let's show the guys our new secret best-friends hand- shake. Gimme five, man!

speaker: HAMM
text: Something's screwy here.

speaker: WOODY
text: So, you see? We're friends now, guys. Aren't we, Buzz? You bet. Gimme a hug. Woody makes Buzz's arm grab his neck and pull him forward.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ha, na, oh, I love you, too.

speaker: SLINKY
text: See? It is Buzz. Now give back the lights, Potato Head.

speaker: WOODY
text: Nothing. Woody innocently shrugs and throws both his hands up... exposing the severed arm. The toys all SCREAM in horror. Rex clasps his hands to his mouth and turns away to BARF. Realizing his mistake, Woody tries to hide the arm, but it's too late.

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh, that is disgusting.

speaker: WOODY
text: No! No, no, no, no!

speaker: WOODY
text: No, it's not what you think, I swear!

speaker: WOODY
text: No! No! Don't leave! Don't leave! You've gotta help us, please! You don't know what it's like over here!

speaker: HAMM
text: Go back to your lives, citizens. Show's over. All the toys leave the window except Slinky.

speaker: WOODY
text: Come back! Slink'! Slink', please! Please! Listen to me! Unable to look Woody in the eye, Slinky closes the blinds.

speaker: WOODY
text: No! No! Come back! SLI-I-I- INKYYY!! SFX: THUNDER As storm clouds roll over Sid's house, Woody slumps over the window sill in defeat.

speaker: WOODY
text: BUZZ!! Still holding onto Buzz's arm, Woody jumps down from the desk and runs to Buzz's rescue.

speaker: WOODY
text: Go away, you disgusting freaks! Babyface turns from the fray and charges at Woody with his erector-set pinchers. Woody cowers, shielding himself with Buzz's arm. Babyface clamps onto the arm and has a tug-o-war with Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: Alright back! Back, you cannibals! Woody loses his grip on the arm and sails across the room, crashing into the wall. By now there is no sight of Buzz within the swarming mass of mutant toys. Woody attacks the mob with a vengeance.

speaker: WOODY
text: He is still alive, and you're not gonna get him, you monsters! He furiously throws the mutant toys aside, digging his way to...

speaker: BUZZ
text: He is sitting up, his broken arm now newly-attached. Woody's anger turns to confusion.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey?! Hey, they fixed you! Woody shakes Buzz's arm to confirm what he's seeing is real then looks to the mutants.

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh... sorry. I... I thought that you were gonna... ... you know, eat my friend. Immediately, the mutant toys retreat back into the dark corners of the room.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey! No, no, wait! Hey! What's wrong?

speaker: SID'S MOM
text: Sid!

speaker: SID
text: Not now, Mom, I'm BUSY!

speaker: WOODY
text: Sid!!! FOOTSTEPS approach the bedroom. Woody tries to pick up the still depressed Buzz, but he just goes limp.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! C'mon, get up! Buzz you're... ... get up... Woody begins dragging Buzz towards the bed, but their progress is too slow. He shakes Buzz hard.

speaker: WOODY
text: Fine. Let Sid trash you. But don't blame me. Woody leaves Buzz sitting alone in the middle of the floor and hides underneath a nearby milkcrate just as... Sid enters carrying a big box.

speaker: SID
text: It came! It finally came! Sid runs over to his workbench and rips open the box.

speaker: SID
text: The big one. He pulls out a rocket with "THE BIG ONE" written on it.

speaker: SID
text: "Extremely dangerous. Keep out of reach of children." COOL... What am I gonna blow? Man... hey, where's that wimpy cowboy doll? Sid spots the milkcrate and picks it up. No Woody. ANGLE: UNDERSIDE OF MILKCRATE Out of Sid's view, Woody presses against the inside, hanging on for dear life. SFX: BUZZ'S LASER Sid looks down and notices he's stepping on Buzz, activating his laser.

speaker: SID
text: Yes! I've always wanted to put a spaceman into orbit. Ha-ha. He places Buzz and the milkcrate on the workbench and throws a toolbox on top of the crate. The impact of the toolbox dislodges Woody from his hiding place. Woody quickly ducks under a magazine on the floor of the crate "jail". Woody watches helplessly as Sid fishes out a roll of electrical tape from the toolbox and, with an IRREVERENT CHUCKLE, tapes Buzz to the rocket SFX: THUNDERCLAP A flash of lightening interrupts the moment.

speaker: SID
text: Oh, no... Sid crosses to the window to see a huge rainstorm commence. Sullenly, he smacks his head against the window.

speaker: SID
text: Aw, man... ! Woody heaves a SIGH of relief. Suddenly Sid's face brightens. He turns his focus from the rain to the Buzzrocket. SID Sid Phillips reporting. Launch of the shuttle has been delayed due to adverse weather conditions at the launch site. Tomorrow's forecast... Sid smacks Buzz down on the desk, winds his alarm clock, and places it next to Buzz.

speaker: SID
text: Sunny. Ha-ha-ha. Sweet dreams.

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: I looked everywhere, honey, but all I could find was your hat.

speaker: ANDY
text: But what if we leave them behind?

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Oh, don't worry honey, I'm sure we'll find Woody and Buzz before we leave tomorrow. Andy's eyes shut. Mom turns out the light and quietly exits the room. A moving box on the floor, with the words "Andy's Toys!" scrawled on it, begins to shake from side to side.

speaker: REX
text: Aaaah! I need air! Rex pops out of the top of the box, COUGHING a packing styrofoam peanut out of his mouth. Potato Head appears beside him.

speaker: REX
text: Aa-a-a-a-ah!

speaker: REX
text: I'm sorry. It's just that I get so nervous before I travel.

speaker: REX
text: Everyone else was picked.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: peeks around the corner of one of the boxes and looks up at Andy fast asleep clutching his cowboy hat.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Oh, Woody, if only you could see how much Andy misses you.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ps-s-s-s-t! Psst! Hey, Buzz! No reaction from Buzz. Woody picks up a stray washer from the desktop and flings it at Buzz, striking his helmet. Buzz lifts his head and turns lifelessly to look at Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey! Get over here and see if you can get this tool box off me. Buzz just looks away from Woody and bows his head.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, come on, Buzz. I... Buzz, I can't do this without you. I need your help.

speaker: BUZZ
text: I can't help. I can't help anyone.

speaker: WOODY
text: Why, sure you can, Buzz. You can get me out of here and then I'll get that rocket off you, and we'll make a break for Andy's house.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Andy's house. Sid's house. What's the difference.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, Buzz, you've had a big fall. You must not be thinking clearly.

speaker: BUZZ
text: No, Woody, for the first time I am thinking clearly. You were right all along. I'm not a Space Ranger. I'm just a toy. A stupid little insignificant toy.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Yeah, right.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, it is. Look, over in that house is a kid who thinks you are the greatest, and it's not because you're a Space Ranger, pal, it's because you're a TOY! You are HIS toy.

speaker: BUZZ
text: But why would Andy want me?

speaker: WOODY
text: Why would Andy want you?! Look at you: You're a Buzz Lightyear. Any other toy would give up his moving parts just to be you. You've got wings, you glow in the dark, you

speaker: WOODY
text: As a matter of fact you're too cool.

speaker: WOODY
text: There's a snake in my boots! Woody bows his head.

speaker: WOODY
text: Why would Andy ever want to play with me, when he's got you? I'm the one that should be strapped to that rocket. Woody slumps dejectedly against the crate, his back to Buzz. Buzz lifts up his foot. ANGLE: THE SOLE OF BUZZ'S FOOT The signature "ANDY" reads through the dirt and scuff marks. Buzz gazes back at Woody. A look of determination spreads across his face

speaker: WOODY
text: Listen Buzz, forget about me. You should get out of here while you can. Silence. Woody turns around. Buzz is gone. Suddenly, the entire milkcrate begins to shake. Woody looks up to see...

speaker: BUZZ
text: He is on top of the milkcrate, trying to push the tool box off.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz!! What are you doing? I thought you were --

speaker: BUZZ
text: Come on, Sheriff. There's a kid over in that house who needs us. Now let's get you out of this thing.

speaker: WOODY
text: Yes Sir! Both Buzz and Woody push the milkcrate and together, they finally get it to move but it's slow progress.

speaker: WOODY
text: Come on, Buzz! We can do it! SFX: TRUCK The two toys stop to look out the window by the workbench. ANGLE: OUT SID'S BEDROOM WINDOW With the rain stopped and the sun beginning to rise...

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody! It's the moving van.

speaker: WOODY
text: We've got to get out of here... NOW. Buzz braces himself between the tool chest and the wall. Using his legs, Buzz pushes with all his might. The toolbox begins to move. Woody notices that with every shove Buzz gives to the tool chest, the milkcrate begins to edge out over the lip of the desk.

speaker: WOODY
text: C'mon, Buzz. Finally the gap is wide enough for Woody to jump through. Woody drops down to the floor below.

speaker: WOODY
text: Alright. Buzz! Hey! I'm out! Buzz doesn't hear Woody and continues to shove the toolbox farther out.

speaker: BUZZ
text: ... almost ... there ... Woody looks up just in time to see the entire toolbox and milkcrate topple towards him.

speaker: WOODY
text: The toolbox CRASHES right on top of Woody. Buzz falls onto the desktop and glances over to Sid, who stirs...

speaker: SID
text: I wanna ride the pony... Sid does not wake. Buzz heaves a SIGH OF RELIEF, then peers over the edge of the workbench.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody! Woody?! Are you alright?! Woody lifts himself out from under the rubble.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, I'm fine... I'm okay... SFX: ALARM CLOCK It goes off by Sid's bed. Woody drops back under the toolbox and Buzz goes limp. Sid groggily sits up for a beat, then his eyes light up.

speaker: SID
text: Oh, yeah! Time for lift-off! Sid jumps out of bed, grabs Buzz and bolts out of the room.

speaker: SID
text: TO INFINITY AND BEYOND!! Woody leaps to his feet, runs across the room, and catches the door just before it closes. As he swings the door back open Woody is confronted by...

speaker: WOODY
text: Aaah! Back! Back! Down! Down! Woody slams the door shut just in time. Scud BARKS AND SCRATCHES at the door.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, what do I do? Come on Woody, think! Woody looks across the room.

speaker: WOODY
text: Guys! The mutant toys all scatter and hide.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no, no! Wait! Wait! Listen! Please! There's a good toy down

speaker: WOODY
