text: Please. He's my friend. He's the only one I've got. Babyface crawls out and bangs in code on the side of Sid's metal bedpost. The mutant toys emerge from the shadows, and gather around Woody. He kneels down into a huddle with them.

speaker: WOODY
text: Thank you. Okay. I think I know what to do. We're going to have to break a few rules, but if it works, it'll help everybody.

speaker: SID
text: Launch pad is being constructed! Heh-heh.

speaker: WOODY
text: All right, listen up. I need Pump

speaker: WOODY
text: You're with Ducky. RollerBob and I don't move till we get the signal. Clear? The mutants all give an affirmative nod.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, let's move! The toys all break. Legs and DUCKY, a duck head Pez dispenser with baby doll torso and plunger base, rush over to a heating grate and pull the face plate off the wall. They disappear into the heating duct.

speaker: WOODY
text: Wind the frog! WALKING CAR, a Hot Wheels car with baby arms, begins winding up THE FROG, a tin wind-up frog with monster truck wheels instead of legs.

speaker: WOODY
text: Wait for the signal.

speaker: WOODY
text: Go!! Hand-in-the-box throws open the door and The Frog is let loose. The Frog zips through Scud's legs and down the hallway. Scud chases after it and follows it down the stairs.

speaker: HANNAH
text: I'll get it! Woody helps the rest of the mutant toys onto the skateboard.

speaker: WOODY
text: Alright, let's go. Using his front arms, Rollerbob propels the skateboard and crew out into the hallway.

speaker: HANNAH
text: I'm coming! I'm coming! ... and opens it.

speaker: HANNAH
text: SCUD!!! Scud suddenly realizes he's been duped, but before he can get back inside, Hannah slams the front door shut.

speaker: HANNAH
text: Stupid dog. Scud smashes into the closed door and begins BARKING furiously. As Hannah storms off into another room she doesn't notice Woody and the mutants zipping off the stairs and round the corner, heading straight into the kitchen.

speaker: WOODY
text: Lean back! The mutants all push back causing the RollerBob to do a wheelie. They smash through the doggie door...

speaker: WOODY
text: Let's go! The mutants disperse to their designated places in the yard.

speaker: SID
text: Hey, Mom?! Where are the matches? Oh, oh, wait, here they are. Nevermind... Woody runs towards Buzz, who spots Woody approaching.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody?! Great! Help me out of this thing! Woody stops a few feet away from Buzz.

speaker: WOODY
text: Shhhhhhh!

speaker: BUZZ
text: What?!

speaker: WOODY
text: It's ok. Everything's under control. Woody deliberately falls down limp on the grass.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody?! What are you doing?! Sid emerges from the tool shed. Buzz freezes. SID Houston, all systems are go. Requesting permission to launch -- Hey! How'd you get out here? Sid picks up Woody, examines him for a beat and then smiles.

speaker: SID
text: Oh, well, you and I can have a cookout later. Ha-ha-ha... He sticks a match prominently in Woody's holster and tosses him onto the grill of an open barbecue. SID Houston, do we have permission to launch? -- Uh, Roger, permission granted. You are confirmed at T minus 10 seconds... During Sid's countdown, all the mutants scurry into their final positions. Sid lights a match.

speaker: SID
text: .. and counting. Ten! Nine! Eight! Seven! Six! Five! Four! Three! Two!... One!... Sid grins menacingly as the match moves towards the fuse.

speaker: WOODY
text: Reach for the sky!!

speaker: SID
text: Huh? Sid pulls back from lighting the fuse. He turns to look at Woody still lying lifelessly atop the barbecue except for the sound emitting from his voice box.

speaker: WOODY
text: This town ain't big enough for the two of us!

speaker: SID
text: What?! Sid walks over to Woody and picks him up.

speaker: WOODY
text: Somebody's poisoned the water hole...

speaker: SID
text: It's busted. He raises Woody up, about to throw him away --

speaker: WOODY
text: Who are you callin' busted, Buster?! Sid stops short and looks at Woody again.

speaker: WOODY
text: That's right. I'm talking to YOU, Sid Phillips. We don't like being blown up, Sid, or smashed, or ripped apart... While Woody's voice box talks, Sid checks the pullstring. It isn't moving. Sid GULPS.

speaker: SID
text: W-w-w-we?

speaker: WOODY
text: That's right. Your toys. The remains of broken toys in the yard, led by the bedroom mutants, begin rising from the ground in "NIGHT OF THE LIVING DEAD" fashion. The toys march forward, forming a circle around Sid. Sid is too frightened to scream or move.

speaker: WOODY
text: From now on, you must take good care of your toys. Because if you don't, we'll find out, Sid. We toys can see... Woody's inanimate head rotates 360 degrees.

speaker: WOODY
text: everything. For a split second Woody's face comes to life.

speaker: WOODY
text: So play nice. Sid drops Woody and bolts inside the house.

speaker: SID
text: AAAAAAAGGGGGGHHHHHH!!!!! Woody and all the toys CHEER VICTORIOUSLY.

speaker: SID
text: The toys! The toys are alive! Sid eyes Hannah's doll and pats it gently on the head.

speaker: SID
text: N-N-Nice dolly... Hannah, sensing Sid's fear, suddenly thrusts the doll in Sid's face. He SCREAMS and runs upstairs. Hannah chases after him, taunting.

speaker: HANNAH
text: What's wrong, Sid?! Don't you want to play with Sally?! EXT: SID'S BACKYARD The toys are all congratulating one another.

speaker: WOODY
text: Nice work, fellahs. Good job.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody! Woody turns around and looks at Buzz, who's still affixed to Sid's launchpad. Buzz extends his hand to Woody.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Thanks. They shake. SFX: VAN HORN HONKING

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Everybody say, "'Bye, house."

speaker: ANDY
text: Bye, house. Buzz and Woody look in the direction of Andy's house. ANGLE: ANDY'S DRIVEWAY - THE FAMILY VAN Through the fence, Andy and his family can be seen getting into the van.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody! The van! Woody quickly hoists Buzz off the pole he was tied to.

speaker: WOODY
text: We gotta run! Thanks, guys. With the rocket still taped to Buzz, the two toys sprint towards the fence. SFX: VAN ENGINE STARTING

speaker: WOODY
text: Quick! Woody easily slips through the slats in the fence, but Buzz's rocket causes him to become stuck.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Just go! I'll catch up! Woody jumps down and runs back for Buzz. The van begins pulling out of the driveway. Woody tugs on a loosened slat and breaks Buzz free of the fence. The two toys run out into the street just in time to see the van driving off down the street. SFX: TRUCK ENGINE Woody and Buzz turn around.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Come on! ANGLE: SID'S FRONT PORCH Scud is lying on the porch when he suddenly perks up at the sight of the two tiny toys running down the street after the moving truck. Scud bears his teeth and GROWLS. .EXT. NEIGHBORHOOD STREET Buzz runs up close to the truck with Woody still back a few paces.

speaker: BUZZ
text: You can do it, Woody. Woody gives a mighty leap and catches hold of the strap.

speaker: WOODY
text: Whew, I made it! Woody begins climbing up when suddenly Buzz goes pale. Woody looks behind him to see...

speaker: WOODY
text: Aaaaaahh!! Get away, you stupid dog! Down! Down! Scud tugs on Woody, pulling him down to the end of the strap.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Hold on, Woody!

speaker: WOODY
text: I can't do it! Take care of Andy for me!

speaker: BUZZ
text: NO-O-O-O-O-O-O-!! Buzz leaps off of the truck and onto Scuds snout. He grabs Scud's eyelids and snaps them hard. Scud YELPS, letting go of Woody. The dog bucks wildly with Buzz hanging onto his face.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz! The moving truck continues down the street leaving Buzz and Scud behind. Still hanging onto the strap, Woody scrambles up onto the bumper. He unlocks the back door of the truck and tries to lift up the heavy door. Suddenly, the family van and moving truck come to a stop at a traffic light.. Woody slams into the door, causing it to fly upward taking Woody with it. Hanging from the door, Woody scans the inside of the truck until he spots what he's looking for.

speaker: TOYS
text: What?!

speaker: REX
text: Are we there already?

speaker: SLINKY
text: Woody?! How'd you -- Woody's response is to slide the box aside and begin rummaging through the next box. Slinky, Potato Head, Rex and the other toys GRUMBLE IN CONFUSION as they poke their heads up out of the first box.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ah-hah! There you are!! Woody pulls the RC Car and its remote out of the second box.

speaker: REX
text: He's at it again!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Get him!!! All the toys pour out of their boxes and CHARGE on Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ah-h!! Ah-h! No, no! Woody continues to steer the remote while trying to avoid the angry mob of toys. Buzz jumps on to the RC car and they zoom back towards the moving truck. Scud is right on their heels and is about to chomp down on Buzz -- Rocky picks up Woody and spins him over his head.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no, no! Wait! Whoa-Whoa-Whoa... ! -- The RC Car suddenly swerves from Scud's jaws and starts doing doughnuts in the middle of the street.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Whoa-Whoa-Whoa... ! Rocky throws Woody to the floor. -- RC resumes his course straight down the street with Scud giving close chase. Hamm leaps off a pile of boxes and onto Woody.

speaker: HAMM
text: Pig pile!! -- The RC car hops up in the air, tossing Buzz up and off. Buzz manages to land back on RC, but facing backwards. ANGLE: TRAFFIC LIGHT It changes red again and the wall of cross traffic resumes. Buzz and the RC Car drive straight into it. Scud blindly follows them into the traffic and skids to a halt just missing a car. The car swerves and CRASHES into another car. Soon there is a multi-car pile up that encircles Scud, entrapping the dog. Buzz and the RC Car emerge from the intersection safely on the other side.

speaker: WOODY
text: No wait! You don't understand! Buzz is out there! We've gotta help him!!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Toss 'im overboard!

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no, no, wait! The toys toss him out into the road. As the truck drives off the toys CHEER.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: So long Woody!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Who-o-o-oa! Woody! The RC Car sweeps up Woody and keeps driving. Woody finds himself sitting in front of Buzz

speaker: WOODY
text: Well, thanks for the ride.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Look out!! The toys are about to slam into the rear tire of the car that had passed over Woody earlier. Woody SCREAMS and gives the steering wheel on the remote a hard left, missing the tire by inches. The RC Car moves up under the car.

speaker: WOODY
text: Now let's catch up to that truck! ANGLE: RC REMOTE Woody flicks a switch from "ON" to "TURBO". The RC Car speeds up towards the moving truck.

speaker: LENNY
text: Guys! Guys! Woody's riding RC! And Buzz is with him!

speaker: TOYS
text: What?!!! The toys rush to the edge of the open truck. Bo picks up Lenny and looks through him. ANGLE: BINOCULAR VIEW OF BUZZ & WOODY

speaker: BO PEEP
text: It is Buzz! Woody was telling the truth!

speaker: SLINKY
text: What have we done?!

speaker: REX
text: Great. Now I have guilt.

speaker: WOODY
text: We're almost there.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Rocky! The ramp! Rocky, the wrestler doll, rushes over to a lever on the side of the back. The sign above it reads "RAMP: UP/DOWN". Rocky pushes down hard on the lever. The ramp begins to lower. Woody & Buzz look up to see the ramp about to come down right on top of them.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Look out!! The RC Car pulls back just before the heavy ramp slams into the road. Sparks fly everywhere from the metal scraping the pavement.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Quick! Hold on to my tail! Potato Head and Rex grab on to Slinky's tail allowing Slinky's front end to jump off the truck and onto the ramp. Slinky leans forward with his paw outstretched to Woody. Woody hands the remote to Buzz and leans forward to grab Slinky's hand. ANGLE: WOODY & SLINKY'S HANDS They grab hold of one another.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: That a boy, Slink!! All of a sudden, the RC Car begins to slow down pulling Slinky's front end off the ramp.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Woody!! His slinky middle begins to stretch and stretch...

speaker: SLINKY
text: Woody! Speed up!

speaker: WOODY
text: Speed up!

speaker: BUZZ
text: The batteries! They're running out! RC's headlight eyes sag. The car slows even more. As Slinky continues stretching. The RC Car begins to weave side-to-side like a water skier.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Whoa! Whoa! Whoa!

speaker: SLINKY
text: I can't hold on much longer!

speaker: WOODY
text: Slink'! Hang on! Slinky's hand slips, sending his front shooting back into the moving truck and knocking over all the toys. The RC Car sputters to a stop. Woody and Buzz watch in vain as the family van and moving truck disappear. Buzz tosses the remote to the ground in frustration.

speaker: WOODY
text: Great!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody! The rocket!

speaker: WOODY
text: The match! Woody pulls out the match from his holster that Sid had put there earlier.

speaker: WOODY
text: Yes! Thank you, Sid! Woody runs around behind Buzz, strikes the match against RC's back tire, and is about to light the fuse when...

speaker: WOODY
text: No-o-o! No-no-no-no! No-o-o! Unable to watch a cowboy cry, Buzz bows his head, causing his helmet to block the sun from Woody. As Buzz's shadow passes over him, Woody stops whimpering and looks at his hand.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody?! What are you doing?

speaker: WOODY
text: Hold still, Buzz! The fuse lights.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ha-ha!!

speaker: BUZZ
text: You did it! Next stop. Andy. Woody jumps back onto the car then suddenly stops smiling.

speaker: WOODY
text: Wait a minute... I just lit a rocket. Rockets explo -- SFX: ROCKET EXPLOSION The RC CAR rockets forward. Speeding along the dividing line in the road, it easily passes car after car until the moving truck can be seen on the horizon.

speaker: SLINKY
text: I shoulda held on longer. Lenny looks out the back again.

speaker: LENNY
text: Look! Look! It's Woody and Buzz! Comin' up fast! The toys run to the opening and CHEER. ANGLE: BUZZ AND WOODY The rocket is so strong that it begins to lift Buzz and Woody off the RC Car. Woody manages to continue holding

speaker: REX
text: Take cover!! Woody is forced to let go of the RC Car. They separate, sending the two toys upward and RC into the back of the truck. RC smashes into Potato Head, sending all of his parts flying.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ahhh!! This is the part where we blow up!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Not today! Buzz confidently presses the button on his chest.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ah-h-h-h-h!! Just then Buzz banks under some power lines and soars upward again. Woody takes a peek. They're flying.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey, Buzz!! You're flying!!

speaker: BUZZ
text: This isn't flying. This is falling -- with style!

speaker: WOODY
text: Ha ha!! To Infinity and Beyond!! They soar gracefully towards the moving truck, but then pass over it.

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh, Buzz?! We missed the truck!

speaker: BUZZ
text: We're not aiming for the truck! ANGLE: FAMILY VAN Buzz & Woody fly right over the van's sun roof and then drop into the car.

speaker: ANDY
text: Hey! Wow!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: What? What is it?

speaker: ANDY
text: Woody! Buzz!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Oh, great, you found them. Where were they?

speaker: ANDY
text: Here! In the car!

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: See? Now, what did I tell you? Right where you left them. Andy hugs both toys.

speaker: ANDY
text: Which one can I open first?

speaker: MRS. DAVIS
text: Let's let Molly open one.

speaker: HAMM
text: Hey, heads up everybody! It's showtime. Woody and the rest of the toys are MINGLING together like a typical office Christmas Party.

speaker: REX
text: Oh! It's time! The toys all stop and run towards the monitor. Woody is about to follow when a crook pulls him backwards to reveal...

speaker: WOODY
text: Whoooooah! Oh! Bo! There's gotta be a less painful way to get my attention.

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Merry Christmas, Sheriff. She smiles and points her crook upwards to her sheep perched on a shelf dangling mistletoe.

speaker: WOODY
text: Say, isn't that mistletoe?

speaker: BO PEEP
text: Mm-hmmmmmm. Bo drops her crook, dips Woody and KISSES him. The rest of the toys have congregated below the monitor restless with "excitement" not fear.

speaker: REX
text: Maybe Andy'll get another dinosaur, like a leaf-eater. That way, I could play the, uh, dominant predator. Ha ha ha! Slinky LAUGHS with Rex.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Quiet everyone, quiet! SARGENT Molly's first present i-i-is...Mrs. Potato Head. Repeat. A Mrs. Potato Head.

speaker: HAMM
text: Way to go, Idaho! All the toys CONGRATULATE Potato Head.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz. Buzz Lightyear. You are not worried, are you? SARGENT

speaker: BUZZ
text: Me? No, no, no, no... Are you?

speaker: WOODY
text: Now Buzz, what could Andy possibly get that is worse than you?! We TRUCK OUT through the window to the EXT. as we

speaker: ANDY
text: Oh, what is it? What is it? SFX: BARKING

speaker: ANDY
text: Wow! A puppy! We ZOOM BACK through the window to a CLOSE UP of Buzz and Woody. They look at one another with a half-smile, half-grimace and LAUGH WEAKLY. FADE OUT.
